Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Wh-Wh-What's going on!? Why is the world suddenly declaring an emergency!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Someone's going to have to pay big for this one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I guess all I can do is believe in them...[n]{f 1 1}
